calendar.matters:
Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove Up Hearing. Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Brenda Fields.
Carole Cullum, Esq., for plaintiff Francis of Assisi Comuunity.
Phil Horne, Esq. subed in for defendant at 11:10 a.m., Defendant, Silas Telfor also present. Parties met in chambers, but unable to reached a settlement.
11:30 a.m. Plaintiff's witness, Pat Sepulveda was sworn, direct and cross by counsels.
11:45 a.m. Defendant's witness, Edith Pettaway was sworn, direct and cross by counsels.
11:50 a.m. Defendant's witness, Barbara Saad was sworn, direct and cross by counsels.
12:10 p.m. Court recess until 03:00 p.m., will resume after hearing the pre-scheduled Court's calendar at 02:00 p.m.
03:00 p.m. All parties present.
Defendant's witness Terance Washington was sworn, direct and cross by counsels.
Defendant's Exh A - Lease Agreement and Exh B - Assisi gram dated Oct. 2002 and sign-in procedures--------------ID/EVID.
03:15 p.m. Defendant's witness Glenda Johnson was sworn, direct by cousel, no cross.
03:25 p.m. Defendant's witness Silas Telfore waa sworn, direct and cross by counsel.
03:45 p.m. No Further by plaintiff. Defendant calls PLT's witness Ms. Sepulveda, cross and re-direct by counsel.
03:55 p.m. Conclusion of testimony by witnesses.
04:10 P.M. Matter is submitted, Ms. Cullum to submitt legal brief and closing statements by 5 p.m., Sept. 5, 2003. Mr. Horne's opposition is due by 5 p.m. Sept. 19, 2003 and Ms. Cullum's reply due 5 p.m. Sept. 26, 2003.
The Court to rule based on briefs and the adequacy of the stipulation. If the stipulation is void, the matter is ended. If not, then the Court will rule on possession.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibits in open court.
The Court takes matter under submission.

Default Prove Up In Scd. #218 At 9:00 A.M.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2003 Continued To Aug-21-03 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This casuse came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, CSR: Brenda Fields, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo
Written request for continuance received from plaintiff. Matter is continued to August 21, 2003 at 9AM in 218.
